title: Purely Tender Saudi Arabian Lamb Biryani
description: A tender and flavorful Saudi Arabian dish featuring lamb and biryani masala, perfect for a solo dinner, this recipe is low in glycemic index and features a unique tempering chocolate element.
instructions: Heat the ghee in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until they are browned on all sides.
Add the biryani masala, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the basmati rice and stir to combine with the lamb and spice mixture.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the saucepan, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Melt the tempering chocolate in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30 second increments, stirring between each interval.
Stir the melted chocolate into the lamb and rice mixture.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve hot.
